summary: Iteration 3 - Backend testing 100% pass (16/16 tests). Fixed critical BNS analysis bug. Frontend: Legal Intelligence Engine working with BNS 318 analysis and remand note generation. Jurisdiction Finder has frontend bugs preventing proper functionality.

fixed.issue: TypeError in analyze_bns - BNSSection object not subscriptable (line 1417)
fixed.fix: Changed s['section_number'] to s.section_number for Pydantic model access

ui_bugs.issue: Map container re-initialization error - 'Map container is already initialized' causing crashes on navigation
ui_bugs.root_cause: Leaflet map not properly cleaned up in useEffect cleanup, causing double initialization in React Strict Mode

ui_bugs.issue: Police stations not loading - shows '0 stations loaded' even though API returns 100 stations
ui_bugs.root_cause: useEffect on line 137 has missing dependency 'allStations', causing race condition between map init and stations loading

ui_bugs.issue: Map click does not show nearest station details
ui_bugs.root_cause: onMapClick function defined in useEffect with empty dependency array, causing stale closure issue. ESLint warns about this.

ui_bugs.issue: Search for station shows 'Station not found' even for valid stations like Madhapur
ui_bugs.root_cause: Search depends on allStations being populated, but stations are not loaded due to above bug

passed_tests: Backend: Root API returns SAAKSHYAM AI message
Backend: Login with TEST002/test1234 credentials works
Backend: Login fails with wrong password (401)
Backend: BNS analyze for cheating/fraud returns BNS 318
Backend: BNS analyze for theft returns BNS 303
Backend: BNS analyze for assault returns BNS 115/121
Backend: BNS analyze generates remand note for offence sections
Backend: Section search for BNS 318 works
Backend: Section search for IPC 420 finds BNS 318
Backend: Section search for invalid section returns found=false
Backend: Jurisdiction stations API returns 100 stations
Backend: Jurisdiction find API returns nearest station with Haversine distance
Backend: FIR list endpoint works
Backend: FIR create endpoint works
Backend: Reminders list endpoint works
Frontend: Login page shows SAAKSHYAM AI branding
Frontend: Dashboard shows 9 module cards with NEW badges
Frontend: Legal Intelligence Engine shows 4 tabs (All Laws, BNS, BNSS, BSA)
Frontend: Legal Intelligence case analysis finds BNS 318 for cheating case
Frontend: Legal Intelligence shows IPC 420 equivalent
Frontend: Remand Note auto-generation visible in Legal Intelligence
failed_tests: Frontend: Jurisdiction Finder map click does not show station details
Frontend: Jurisdiction Finder stations not displaying (0 loaded)
Frontend: Jurisdiction Finder search not working
action_items: FIX (HIGH): Jurisdiction Finder - Refactor useEffect hooks to handle Leaflet map lifecycle properly
FIX (HIGH): Jurisdiction Finder - Add proper cleanup in useEffect to prevent 'Map already initialized' error
FIX (HIGH): Jurisdiction Finder - Move onMapClick function outside useEffect or use useCallback with proper dependencies
FIX (HIGH): Jurisdiction Finder - Ensure allStations is available before map click handler is used
critical_code_review_comments: JurisdictionFinder.js line 137: ESLint warning about missing 'allStations' dependency causing race condition
JurisdictionFinder.js: The onMapClick function captures stale closures due to empty useEffect dependency array
JurisdictionFinder.js: Leaflet map initialization should check if map already exists before creating new instance
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed BNSSection subscript error on line 1417

success_rate.frontend: 70% (Legal Intelligence working, Jurisdiction Finder has bugs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working after BNS analysis fix. Legal Intelligence Engine frontend working with BNS analysis and remand note. Jurisdiction Finder has React hooks/Leaflet lifecycle issues preventing functionality. The backend jurisdiction API works (verified via curl), issue is frontend state management.

mocked_apis.note: Google Vision, Translate, and Speech APIs configured but have credential loading issues (PEM file errors in logs). Core features work without these APIs.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: Line 1417 in server.py used dict subscript s['section_number'] on BNSSection Pydantic model objects which should use attribute access s.section_number
rca_of_issue.reproduction: POST /api/bns/analyze with text containing multiple keywords that would match multiple sections
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Changed s['section_number'] to s.section_number in the any() generator expression
rca_of_issue.verified: Yes - all 16 backend tests now pass
